title: TISS Counsellor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
shortInfo: Tata Institute of Social Sciences (TISS) Recruitment 2026: Tata Institute of Social Sciences has released the official notification for 3 Counsellor (Part-time) posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking government jobs.

basic_details.short_information: Tata Institute of Social Sciences (TISS) Recruitment 2026: Tata Institute of Social Sciences has released the official notification for 3 Counsellor (Part-time) posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking government jobs.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Master’s degree (M.A.) in Applied Psychology (Counselling Psychology or Clinical Psychology) from a recognized university, Minimum 2-4 years of relevant professional experience as a Counsellor, Specialized training in Couples and Family Therapy preferred, Experience in legal, judicial or court-based settings preferred, Proficiency in English, Hindi and Marathi mandatory
qualification.details: Master’s degree (M.A.) in Applied Psychology (Counselling Psychology or Clinical Psychology) from a recognized university. Minimum 2-4 years of relevant professional experience as a Counsellor. Specialized training in Couples and Family Therapy preferred. Experience in legal, judicial or court-based settings preferred. Proficiency in English, Hindi and Marathi mandatory.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 31-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the TISS Counsellor (Part-time) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the TISS Counsellor (Part-time) posts is 31st May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Counsellor (Part-time) post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies announced for the Counsellor (Part-time) position by the Tata Institute of Social Sciences (TISS) in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Counsellor (Part-time) role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master’s degree (M.A.) in Applied Psychology (Counselling Psychology or Clinical Psychology) from a recognized university to be eligible for this post.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any experience required for this position?
faq.answer: Yes, a minimum of 2-4 years of relevant professional experience as a Counsellor is required. Experience in legal, judicial, or court-based settings is also preferred.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Counsellor (Part-time) post?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Counsellor (Part-time) position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 20,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the TISS Counsellor (Part-time) recruitment is through email. Candidates need to send their complete application along with necessary documents to the specified email address.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Counsellor (Part-time) position?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Counsellor (Part-time) post will be based on an Interview. Candidates shortlisted will be called for the interview round.

faq.question: Q9. Which languages are mandatory for the Counsellor (Part-time) role?
faq.answer: Proficiency in English, Hindi, and Marathi is mandatory for all candidates applying for the Counsellor (Part-time) position at TISS.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The Counsellor (Part-time) positions are offered on a contractual basis. This means the employment will be for a fixed term as per the contract agreement.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the TISS Counsellor (Part-time) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the TISS Counsellor (Part-time) posts is 31st May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.
